meaning: 雅尔塔[苏联克里米亚半岛南岸港市]
examples: What was the major decisions made at Yalta conference?
The debt incurred at Yalta and the indivisibility of a free Europe demanded no less.
Critics of the Yalta agreements tend to forget that the Russian, also, made substantial concessions.
Conspicuously, there were no representatives from Russia in Yalta, but its shadow was felt.
At the time of the Yalta conference, the Soviets had the advantage of having their troops in the heart of Europe.
